## Validation

- [ ] `python -m py_compile pdf_glyph_replace.py`
- [ ] `python -m unittest discover -s tests -v`
- [ ] `python -m build`
- [ ] `pdf-glyph-replace --version`

## Privacy

- [ ] No private PDFs, statements, receipts, invoices, or sensitive document content are included.
- [ ] Any new fixture or example is synthetic or reduced enough for a public repository.
- [ ] Generated scratch artifacts remain under ignored paths such as `work/` or local `tmp*.pdf` files.
